name: tandem_repeat_telomeric
description: Vertebrate telomere repeat (TTAGGG)n on the lagging strand / (CCCTAA)n on the leading strand. Caps every linear chromosome end; typical length in somatic human cells 5-15 kb, in germline up to ~20 kb. The 6 bp hexamer drives extremely low Shannon entropy (~0.5) because only a handful of 5-mers occur. GC ~0.5. Sub-telomeric regions transition into TAR1 / degenerate variants which classifier should treat as low_complexity rather than terminal_repeat.
